finding: A retained cross-run OIDC replay ledger must not influence acceptance until exact ledger bytes are bound to an independently verified GitHub attestation and trusted repository/workflow identity.

verification.method: isolated Node 22 test run against byte-identical pre-commit files
cases: exact ledger bytes and trusted identity accepted

privacy_boundary: No JWT, credential, raw jti, health data, private chat, or secret value was persisted.
limits: The component validates normalized verifier output; it does not download artifacts or execute gh attestation verify.
Authentication does not prove ledger completeness or freshness.
Cloudflare deployment remains blocked by external credential configuration.
next_action: Wire authenticated artifact retrieval and normalized GitHub attestation verification into the Cloudflare workflow before passing a prior ledger to run-github-oidc-evidence.mjs.
